content.json:
# Factory GenAI Tracing Workbook
Machine-first monitoring for TireForge agents across traces, requests, and dependencies.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions))
| extend AgentName = extract(@'(anomaly-detection-agent|fault-diagnosis-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload)
| where isnotempty(AgentName)
| extend DurationMs = coalesce(todouble(duration), todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms)), PromptTokens = coalesce(todouble(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), todouble(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.prompt_tokens']), todouble(customDimensions.gen_ai_prompt_token_count)), CompletionTokens = coalesce(todouble(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']), todouble(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.completion_tokens']), todouble(customDimensions.gen_ai_completion_token_count)), Status = coalesce(tostring(success), tostring(customDimensions.otel_status_code))
| summarize Invocations = dcount(operation_Id), AvgLatencyMs = round(avg(DurationMs), 2), P95LatencyMs = round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 2), TotalPromptTokens = sum(PromptTokens), TotalCompletionTokens = sum(CompletionTokens), Errors = countif(Status has 'false' or Status has 'ERROR') by AgentName
| order by Invocations desc

union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions))
| extend AgentName = extract(@'(anomaly-detection-agent|fault-diagnosis-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload)
| where isnotempty(AgentName)
| extend DurationMs = coalesce(todouble(duration), todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms))
| summarize AvgLatencyMs = round(avg(DurationMs), 2), P95LatencyMs = round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 2) by bin(timestamp, 5m), AgentName
| render timechart

union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions))
| extend MachineId = extract(@'(MX-\d{3}|EX-\d{3}|CP-\d{3}|CU-\d{3}|IS-\d{3})', 1, Payload)
| where isnotempty(MachineId)
| summarize TraceCount = count(), Operations = dcount(operation_Id), LastSeen = max(timestamp) by MachineId
| order by TraceCount desc

union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions))
| extend MachineId = extract(@'(MX-\d{3}|EX-\d{3}|CP-\d{3}|CU-\d{3}|IS-\d{3})', 1, Payload)
| where isnotempty(MachineId)
| extend Severity = case(Payload has 'critical', 'critical', Payload has 'warning', 'warning', Payload has 'normal', 'normal', 'unknown')
| summarize TraceCount = count() by MachineId, Severity
| render barchart

union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions))
| extend Business = extract(@'(TireForge Industries)', 1, Payload), Floor = extract(@'(Production Line A)', 1, Payload)
| where isnotempty(Business) or isnotempty(Floor)
| summarize TraceCount = count(), Operations = dcount(operation_Id) by Business, Floor
| order by TraceCount desc

union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions))
| where Payload has 'check_thresholds'
| extend Status = coalesce(tostring(success), tostring(customDimensions.otel_status_code)), DurationMs = coalesce(todouble(duration), todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms))
| summarize Invocations = count(), AvgLatencyMs = round(avg(DurationMs), 2), P95LatencyMs = round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 2), Errors = countif(Status has 'false' or Status has 'ERROR') by ToolName = 'check_thresholds'

union isfuzzy=true withsource=SourceTable traces, requests, dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions))
| extend AgentName = extract(@'(anomaly-detection-agent|fault-diagnosis-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload), MachineId = extract(@'(MX-\d{3}|EX-\d{3}|CP-\d{3}|CU-\d{3}|IS-\d{3})', 1, Payload), Status = coalesce(tostring(success), tostring(customDimensions.otel_status_code)), DurationMs = coalesce(todouble(duration), todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms)), Tokens = coalesce(todouble(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), todouble(customDimensions.gen_ai_prompt_token_count)) + coalesce(todouble(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']), todouble(customDimensions.gen_ai_completion_token_count))
| where isnotempty(AgentName) or isnotempty(MachineId)
| project Timestamp = timestamp, SourceTable, operation_Id, AgentName, MachineId, Status, DurationMs, Tokens, Message = substring(Payload, 0, 180)
| order by Timestamp desc
| take 100
